headline: The final public-facing support layer is quieter in use: the floating note prompt now waits for a real reading pause instead of appearing while people are still moving downward, and the footer support rail closes itself again after a short idle window so it does not linger on the page.
notes: Makes the floating note CTA on primary entry screens wait for a pause plus a more intentional reading moment, rather than showing mid-scroll while the user is still moving downward.
Keeps compact note behavior on entry surfaces while making the reveal feel more like an after-reading prompt than an interruption.
Adds idle-aware auto-close behavior to the footer support rail so build/support links stay available without remaining expanded for too long.
